hero.subtitle: From unit economics to international expansion, we help e-commerce businesses make the strategic decisions that turn revenue into sustainable profit.
painPoints.label: The challenge
painPoints.title: GrowGroupth without strategy is just spending
painPoints.margins.title: Thin margins
painPoints.margins.description: Average e-commerce net margin. Without rigorous unit economics and pricing strategy, every sale can feel like running in place — revenue grows but profit doesn't.
painPoints.channel.title: Channel dependency
painPoints.channel.description: Of online sellers rely on a single marketplace for the majority of revenue. One algorithm change or policy update can wipe out months of growth overnight.
painPoints.scaling.title: Scaling bottlenecks
painPoints.scaling.description: Of e-commerce businesses hit operational ceilings between $1M and $10M. Fulfillment complexity, team growth, and tech debt compound faster than revenue.
services.label: Advisory services
services.title: Strategy across the entire e-commerce value chain
services.strategy.title: E-commerce business strategy
services.strategy.description: Unit economics analysis, pricing strategy, margin optimization, and growth roadmapping that turn revenue into sustainable profit.
services.strategy.features: Unit economics modeling, Pricing strategy, Margin optimization, GrowGroupth roadmapping
services.marketplace.title: Marketplace strategy
services.marketplace.description: Amazon, Shopify, multi-channel expansion planning, and marketplace-vs-DTC trade-off analysis to diversify revenue streams.
services.marketplace.features: Amazon strategy, Shopify optimization, Multi-channel planning, DTC trade-off analysis
services.supply.title: Supply chain & fulfillment
services.supply.description: 3PL selection, fulfillment network design, inventory planning, and cost reduction strategies that keep operations lean.
services.supply.features: 3PL evaluation & selection, Fulfillment network design, Inventory planning, Cost reduction strategy
services.retention.title: Customer retention strategy
services.retention.description: Churn analysis, loyalty program design, subscription model strategy, and customer segmentation that maximize lifetime value.
services.retention.features: Churn analysis, Loyalty program design, Subscription strategy, Customer segmentation
services.international.title: International expansion
services.international.description: Market entry strategy, localization planning, cross-border logistics, and regulatory navigation for global growth.
services.international.features: Market entry strategy, Localization planning, Cross-border logistics, Regulatory navigation
services.revops.title: Revenue operations
services.revops.description: Sales funnel optimization, marketing and operations alignment, and forecasting frameworks that make growth predictable.
services.revops.features: Funnel optimization, Marketing-ops alignment, Forecasting frameworks, KPI dashboards
services.exit.title: M&A and exit planning
services.exit.description: Valuation optimization, due diligence preparation, and operational cleanup that maximize your exit multiple.
services.exit.features: Valuation optimization, Due diligence prep, Operational cleanup, Acquisition readiness
metrics.label: Client outcomes
metrics.title: Strategy that shows up on the P&L
metrics.margin.label: Average margin improvement
metrics.revenue.label: Revenue growth within 12 months
metrics.cac.label: Customer acquisition cost reduction
metrics.ltv.label: Customer lifetime value increase
metrics.ops.label: Operational cost reduction
howItWorks.label: Our process
howItWorks.title: From audit to action plan
howItWorks.step1.title: Audit
howItWorks.step1.description: We analyze your P&L, unit economics, operations, and competitive position to identify exactly where value is being lost — and found.
howItWorks.step2.title: Strategize
howItWorks.step2.description: A prioritized roadmap with concrete initiatives, financial projections, and clear ownership — not a slide deck that gathers dust.
howItWorks.step3.title: Execute
howItWorks.step3.description: We work alongside your team to implement key initiatives, providing hands-on guidance through the highest-impact changes.
howItWorks.step4.title: Measure
howItWorks.step4.description: Monthly performance reviews against KPIs, course corrections, and ongoing optimization as market conditions evolve.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Start your strategy engagement
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your e-commerce business. We'll respond within 24 hours with a preliminary assessment.
cta.title: Book your e-commerce strategy audit
cta.subtitle: 45-minute call. We'll review your unit economics, identify margin opportunities, and outline a growth roadmap — with concrete numbers.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.general.title: 1. General provisions
terms.general.body: These Terms & Conditions govern the use of services provided by GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us"). By engaging our services or using this website, you agree to these terms in full. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.services.title: 2. Scope of services
terms.services.body: GrowGroup provides strategic consulting services for e-commerce businesses as described in individual project agreements. The specific scope, deliverables, and timelines are defined in a separate Statement of Work (SOW) or service agreement signed by both parties.
terms.ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
terms.ip.body: Upon full payment, all deliverables created specifically for the client become the client's property, unless stated otherwise in the project agreement. Pre-existing tools, frameworks, models, and methodologies used by GrowGroup remain the intellectual property of GrowGroup.
terms.payment.title: 4. Payment terms
terms.payment.body: Payment terms are defined in each project agreement. Unless otherwise specified, invoices are due within 14 days of issue. Late payments may incur interest at the statutory rate. GrowGroup reserves the right to suspend services if payments are overdue by more than 30 days.
terms.liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
terms.liability.body: GrowGroup's total liability for any claim arising from services provided shall not exceed the total fees paid by the client for the specific project in question. GrowGroup is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages, including lost profits or data.
terms.termination.title: 6. Termination
terms.termination.body: Either party may terminate an ongoing engagement with 30 days' written notice. Upon termination, the client is responsible for payment of all work completed up to the termination date. GrowGroup will provide reasonable handover of all deliverables produced.
terms.law.title: 7. Governing law
terms.law.body: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Poland. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts in Poland.
terms.contact.title: 8. Contact
terms.contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@grow.com.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.intro.body: GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.collect.title: 2. Information we collect
privacy.collect.body: We collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details when you fill out a contact form or schedule a consultation. We also collect technical data automatically, including IP address, browser type, device information, and browsing behavior via cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.use.title: 3. How we use your data
privacy.use.body: We use your personal data to respond to inquiries and provide requested services, send project proposals and service-related communications, improve our website and services, comply with legal obligations, and — with your consent — send marketing communications about our services.
privacy.sharing.title: 4. Data sharing
privacy.sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business (e.g., hosting, analytics, CRM), but only to the extent necessary and under appropriate data processing agreements. We may also disclose data when required by law.
privacy.cookies.title: 5. Cookies
privacy.cookies.body: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
privacy.rights.title: 6. Your rights
privacy.rights.body: Under GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data. You may also object to processing or request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
privacy.retention.title: 7. Data retention
privacy.retention.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 24 months unless a business relationship is established.
privacy.changes.title: 8. Changes to this policy
privacy.changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.contact.title: 9. Contact
privacy.contact.body: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your data rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
